name: finish-funnel
description: Size a parkrun finish funnel for orderly finish token handover

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run build:userscript
scripts.build:userscript: tsc && vite build --config vite.userscript.config.ts && cp dist/finish-funnel.user.js finish-funnel.user.js
scripts.check: aube run typecheck && aube test && aube run lint && aube run format:check
